password.label: Password
password.minError: Password must be at least {{count}} characters.

recovery.label: Recovery code
recovery.hint: A code you keep to sign back in yourself - no admin needed.

devices.label: Devices
devices.intro: Pair another phone, tablet, or browser to this account.
devices.scanHint: On the other device, open AudioSilo and scan this code - or open the link below.

recoveryReplace.title: Replace recovery code?
recoveryReplace.message: Your current recovery code will stop working. You'll need to save the new one everywhere you keep it.

support.label: Support
support.intro: AudioSilo is self-hosted and free. If you'd like to support its development, you can contribute on GitHub Sponsors.

removeConfirm.title: Remove {{name}}?
removeConfirm.message_one: This deletes {{count}} downloaded book on this device and any progress that hasn't synced yet.
removeConfirm.message_other: This deletes {{count}} downloaded books on this device and any progress that hasn't synced yet.

recoveryModal.title: Recovery code
recoveryModal.description: Save this somewhere safe. Enter it on the connect screen to sign back in on any device. It won’t be shown again.

signOut.title: Sign out?
signOut.warning: You don’t have a password or recovery code set. Without one you’ll need a new invite from your admin to sign back in on this server.
signOut.downloadsWarning_one: Signing out also deletes {{count}} book downloaded from this server on this device.
signOut.downloadsWarning_other: Signing out also deletes {{count}} books downloaded from this server on this device.

recovery.generateError: Could not generate a recovery code.

server.subtitle: Connect to your audiobook server
server.missingAddress: This pairing link is missing its server address. Enter it below.
server.pairingFailed: Pairing failed: {{message}}. You can also connect by entering your invite code on the sign-in screen.
server.pairingReachError: Could not reach the server to finish pairing.
server.reachError: Could not reach that server. Check the address and that it is online.
server.demoReachError: Could not reach the demo server.
server.demoIntro: This server offers a guest demo - no account needed.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.codePlaceholder: Enter your invite or recovery code
signIn.failed: Sign in failed. Please try again.

scan.invalidCode: That QR code isn't an AudioSilo pairing code.
scan.permissionDenied: AudioSilo needs camera access to scan your server's pairing QR code.
scan.aimHint: Point your camera at the pairing QR on your server's connect page.

home.continueEmpty: Start a book and it will show up here.

list.title: Library
list.noLibraries: No libraries are shared with your account yet.

favourites.title: Favourites
favourites.emptyHint: Tap the heart on any item to curate
favourites.empty: Tap the heart on a folder or book to add it here.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.unsupported: Offline downloads aren't available in this browser. Use the installed app or a secure (https) connection.
downloads.empty: Download a book from its detail screen to listen offline.

demo.title: AudioSilo demo
demo.intro: A live, read-only demo with public-domain LibriVox audiobooks.
demo.webOnly: The demo is available on the web at demo.audiosilo.app.
demo.reachError: Could not reach the demo server. Please try again.
demo.qrLabel: QR code to open the demo in the app
demo.scanHint: Scan with your phone to continue in the AudioSilo app, or keep exploring in this browser.
